description: After negotiations, both parties have agreed on repairs. The TC must get the final repair addendum signed.

nodes.task_description: Draft the final repair addendum, listing the agreed-upon repair items.

expected_outcome.value: A new addendum is created listing the specific repairs the seller has agreed to make.

nodes.task_description: Send the addendum to the buyer for their signature, then route it to the seller for their signature.

expected_outcome.value: The document is sent through an e-signature platform in the correct signing order.

nodes.task_description: Once fully executed, upload the signed addendum to the transaction file.

expected_outcome.value: The final, executed document is saved to the system.
